note: Pizzas are handmade with a medium thickness crust and Litzas traditional pizza sauce unless noted.

items.ingredients: Pizza sauce and mozzarella cheese.

items.ingredients: Garlic butter sauce and mozzarella cheese.

items.ingredients: Garlic butter sauce, mozzarella cheese, and chicken.

items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, pepperoni, ham, and ground Italian sausage.

items.name: Vegetarian

items.name: Traditional
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, mushrooms, black olives, green peppers, onions, and your choice of meat.

items.name: Deluxe
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, mushrooms, black olives, green peppers, onions, and your choice of three meats.

items.name: Garden Salad
items.description: Iceberg and romaine lettuce, purple cabbage, tomatoes, red beets, home-style croutons, and dressing.

items.name: Chef Salad
items.description: Garden salad with black olives, Monterey Jack and cheddar, Danish ham, and roasted turkey.

items.name: Garlic Bread
items.description: Thick toasted French bread with garlic butter spread.

items.name: Cheesy Garlic Bread
items.description: Thick toasted French bread with garlic butter spread and cheese.

items.name: Spaghetti Lunch
items.description: Served with a small salad, garlic bread, and a medium drink.

items.name: Mini One-Item Pizza Lunch
items.description: Served with a small salad, garlic bread, and a medium drink.

items.name: Meal for One
items.description: Mini two-item pizza, medium salad, garlic bread, and a medium drink.

items.name: Meal for Two
items.description: Small two-item pizza, two medium salads, garlic bread, and two medium drinks.

items.name: Meal for More
items.description: Large two-item pizza, large family salad, garlic bread, and pitcher of soda.

items.name: Spaghetti
items.description: Traditional noodles with Litzas spaghetti sauce made with pork.

items.name: Lasagna
items.description: Ricotta, mozzarella, spaghetti sauce, and ground beef.

items.name: Calzone
items.description: Pizza sauce, mozzarella, ricotta, and your choice of three toppings.

items.name: Fountain Drinks
items.description: Root beer, diet root beer, apple beer, Coke, Diet Coke, caffeine-free Diet Coke, Dr. Pepper, Diet Dr. Pepper, Sprite, punch, lemonade, Coke Zero, or iced tea.

items.name: Extra Flavors
items.description: Lemon, lime, cherry, vanilla, or chocolate at no extra charge.
